patch.value: Close c8-exposed coverage gaps in src/cli/commands/history-redact.ts and normalize.ts to 100%

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text:
Closed c8-exposed coverage gaps to genuine 100% (focused-mode verified, isolated coverage dir to avoid CPU contention).

normalize.ts (now 100/100/100/100):
- L145 (normalizeLifecyclePatternList '?? []' arm): converted broken single-line 'c8 ignore next' to start/stop block (settings schema always materializes lifecycle arrays; provably unreachable).
- L242 (duplicate-unset 'if (!has(...))' guard): start/stop block (ACTIVE_CLEAR_FIELD_RULES has distinct unsetField values, so the has()==true arm is unreachable).
- L287 (changes.sort secondary '||' comparator): start/stop block (active-clear and closed-backfill rules are mutually exclusive per item, so two changes never share one field).
Root cause: single-line 'c8 ignore next' does not suppress branch coverage for multi-line if-blocks / ternary-bearing statements in this v8; block form does.

history-redact.ts (now 100/100/100/100) via NEW real tests in tests/unit/commands/history-activity-command.spec.ts (no source ignores added):
- L427 (resolveHistorySubject normalizedId===rawNormalizedId ternary, both arms) + L431 (loop return) + L481 (subject.located?.itemPath ?? null): test 'redacts via the history-stream fallback when the item file is absent (prefixed and bare ids)' — deletes the item file but keeps the history stream, exercising the located=null fallback with both a pm- prefixed id (single candidate) and a bare id (two candidates).
- L493/L528/L584/L622 (hasItemMetadata false -> nextItemDocument/nextItemPath null fallback arms incl. nextItemPath ?? currentItemPath): test 'redacts a deleted items history when the replayed document has no metadata' — create+append leaked token, pm delete (writes tombstone delete op), then redact: replay yields empty-metadata document.
- L338 (typeof entry.message === 'string' else arm): test 'redacts patch values for history entries that carry no message field' — strips message field from history entries so only the patch-value redaction path runs.

No test-only source exports added. No source files other than normalize.ts/history-redact.ts touched. Leaked-secret findings: NONE; all test fixtures use obviously-fake placeholder tokens (no real secrets/keys/private-IPs). Both specs pass (55 tests); tsc --noEmit clean for touched files.

patch.value: Both files driven to genuine 100/100/100/100 (focused). history-redact.ts: 4 new real tests in history-activity-command.spec.ts (located=null history-stream fallback for prefixed+bare ids; deleted-item tombstone replay with no metadata; message-less history entries) cover targets 427/481/528/622 plus 338/431/493/584/622 with zero source ignores. normalize.ts: targets 145/287 (and 242) fixed by converting broken single-line c8-ignore-next to start/stop block form on 3 provably-unreachable defensive arms. No other source files touched, no test-only exports added, no leaked secrets (fake placeholders only).
